description: HELP, STATUS, FOCUS, PAUSE, RESUME, STOP, REJOIN, BOOKED, RESET all fired in sequence. Tests every keyword in the system.

messages._note: 1:1 planner registration
INTRO: create group
HELP: anyone can use. Should show current phase and available commands.
STATUS: shows trip summary
FOCUS: same as STATUS, re-anchors the group
PAUSE (planner-only): suspends session
RESUME attempted by non-planner: should be rejected
RESUME by planner: reactivates
STOP: p2 opts out
REJOIN: p2 opts back in
BOOKED: p3 marks flights as confirmed
RESET attempted by non-planner: should be rejected
RESET by planner: confirms before executing
RESET confirmed
DEADLINE (planner-only): sets a deadline
DESTINATION (planner-only): changes destination
PAID STATUS: check split payment status (none expected)
TYPO: STAUS → STATUS. Fuzzy matching should correct.
TYPO: HLEP → HELP. Fuzzy matching should correct.
TYPO: BOKKED → BOOKED. Fuzzy matching should correct.
